programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.desc: Judge Judy lays down the law when a defendant cops an attitude; a woman says she rescued another woman from a bad relationship, then kicked her out after finding drugs in her room.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Money for Nothing!; Mystery Shopper Injustice?; Payday Intercepted!
programs.desc: When a car turns out to be a lemon, the seller keeps the buyer's family's money; a friend wants repayment for a bad check; a man sues his friend's estranged wife for stealing his insurance check.
